description_long: This is a robust, double-edged axe featuring a long, cylindrical wooden handle with a natural grain finish. The head of the axe is forged from dark metal, with one side forming a broad, curved blade and the opposite side extending into a sharp, pointed pick. The blade has a slightly textured, hammered appearance, while the pick end is sleek and tapers to a fine point. The axe head is securely mounted to the handle with a visible wooden wedge at the top, suggesting a traditional assembly. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty tasks such as chopping or breaching, and the materials and craftsmanship indicate durability and strength.
description: A double-edged axe with a wooden handle and a dark, textured metal head featuring a broad blade and a pointed pick. The design is sturdy and functional, with a traditional mounting style.
description_view_0: The axe is shown with its broad, curved blade and pointed pick clearly visible, highlighting the contrast between the wooden handle and the dark metal head.
description_view_1: This angled view emphasizes the cylindrical shape of the handle and the alignment of the blade and pick, with the wooden wedge at the top of the handle visible.
description_view_2: The metallic texture of the blade is prominent, and the full length of the handle is visible, showing the grain and finish of the wood.
description_view_3: The handle is the main focus, with the axe head partially obscured, revealing the end of the handle and the mounting of the head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical wooden handle with visible grain, no pronounced curvature, smooth grip, and round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Double-edged head with a broad, curved blade on one side and a pointed pick on the other; blade has a slightly textured, hammered finish.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with a visible wooden wedge securing the blade to the handle.
